pain_point: Manual rekeying of order details into ERP creates duplicate entries and delays
target_state: Auto-captured draft order queued in Approval Envelope for review

pain_point: Disconnected credit-limit checks delay release and cause ad-hoc emails
target_state: Real-time credit-hold flag visible before pick release

pain_point: Paper pick lists re-printed and rescanned; wrong quantity logged
target_state: Digitised pick list with barcode confirmation and quantity check

pain_point: Tracking reference entered manually after phone call to carrier
target_state: Carrier label and tracking reference auto-posted to ERP

pain_point: Invoice PDF manually attached to email and sent to customer
target_state: E-invoice generated and dispatched directly from the system

pain_point: Unallocated receipts require manual matching in spreadsheet
target_state: Suggested match queued in Approval Envelope for one-click sign-off

pain_point: Duplicate line-by-line spreadsheet comparison each period end
target_state: Automated reconciliation with source-linked exception list

pain_point: Dispute notes copied between email threads and ERP
target_state: Single case file with status history and audit trail

pain_point: Manual consolidation of multiple workbooks before leadership review
target_state: Source-linked report refreshed from export layer

pain_point: Static slide snapshots with no drill-down or audit trail
target_state: Live self-service dashboard with source-linked figures
